name: Close CRM
description: Close is a CRM built for sales teams to manage leads, contacts, opportunities, and communication. Track emails, calls, and activities with built-in calling and email automation.

capabilities.name: search_leads
capabilities.description: Search for leads using Close's query language with filters on status, custom fields, and activity.

capabilities.name: create_lead
capabilities.description: Create a new lead with contacts, company info, and custom fields.

capabilities.name: list_opportunities
capabilities.description: List sales opportunities with pipeline stage filtering.

capabilities.name: log_activity
capabilities.description: Log a note, email, or call activity on a lead.

capabilities.name: get_lead
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific lead including contacts and activities.

capabilities.name: update_opportunity
capabilities.description: Update an opportunity's status, value, or pipeline stage.
